expected_effect: Preserve the terminal input fix while restoring hidden-target scrolling behavior.

intervention.expected_effect: Preserve the terminal input fix while restoring hidden-target scrolling behavior.
intervention.rationale: The report shows a candidate regression from `missed_scroll_target` while the baseline still had `terminal_input_action_mismatch`; a single replacement policy would likely fix one task family while breaking the other.
intervention.risk: Combining task-scoped policies increases wrapper surface area, so each sub-policy must stay bounded and evidence-gated.
intervention.summary: Compose scroll and terminal action policies instead of replacing one with the other.
